title: Dryopteris devolvens
taxonomy: Dryopteris devolvens is classified within the family Dryopteridaceae, which is a family of ferns commonly known as wood ferns. This species belongs to the genus Dryopteris, a group of ferns that are characterized by their simple, leathery fronds. The classification of Dryopteris devolvens further breaks down to the order Polypodiales, which is a large and diverse group of ferns. At the rank of kingdom, Dryopteris devolvens is classified as Plantae, a broad group that encompasses all plant species. The species also falls under the rank of division Pteridophyta, which is a group of vascular plants that produce spores.
